title: E-Commerce Dashboard
description: A comprehensive admin dashboard for managing products, orders, and analytics. Built with real-time data visualization and dark mode support.

title: Task Management App
description: Collaborative task manager with drag-and-drop functionality, team workspaces, and deadline tracking. Features real-time sync across devices.

title: Portfolio Generator
description: CLI tool for generating static portfolio sites from markdown files. Supports custom themes and automatic GitHub Pages deployment.

title: Weather Station
description: IoT weather monitoring system with a web dashboard. Collects temperature, humidity, and pressure data from multiple sensors.

title: Code Snippets
description: A curated collection of useful code snippets with syntax highlighting, search, and copy-to-clipboard functionality.

title: API Gateway
description: Microservices API gateway with rate limiting, authentication, and request routing. Includes comprehensive logging and monitoring.
